applied: Changed the settings group wrapper from rigid grid behavior to flex-wrap behavior.
Large setting panels now move to the next row instead of clipping off the right edge.
Derived conversion panel uses a wider flexible basis and drops to full width under mid-size layouts.
Mobile layout keeps settings as one-column groups with two-column inner inputs, then one column on very small screens.

validation.numberComparison: PASS: calculation scripts unchanged and passing
validation.uiCheck: PASS: static CSS checks confirm wrapping and mobile breakpoints
validation.regression: PASS: node_test, norm_test, v18, v19, v22, v23, v25, v26, v27 validations passed
